b:
have you ever seen an overpriced golf gadget and thought "i could build that"?

you probably could. that is the whole idea behind ossgolf.

golf has a proud diy history. long before the big brands, pl

t: osstempo: a diy led tempo trainer for golf
d: OSSTempo: a DIY LED tempo trainer for golf
b: osstempo is an open source golf tempo trainer. a ws2812b led strip animates a moving "comet" of light that sweeps along a channel, and you match your putter or club head to the dot to groove a consist

t: r10kit: an unofficial swift sdk for the garmin r10
d: R10Kit: an unofficial Swift SDK for the Garmin R10
b: r10kit is a native swift sdk that connects directly to the garmin approach r10 launch monitor over bluetooth low energy. no first party app, no pc tether. your iphone talks to the r10 and reads every
